---
title: Verizon Partner API Catalog

Explore 34 enterprise APIs across emergency dispatch, private 5G campus networks, utility grid intelligence, and platform services.

## Emergency Dispatch Operations

<CardGroup cols={3}>
  <Card title="City Dispatch" href="/emergency-dispatch/vzw-city-dispatch-api">
    Metro city dispatch APIs for incident creation, unit lookup, dispatch, and telemetry.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Dispatch Workflow Engine" href="/emergency-dispatch/vzw-dispatch-workflow-engine-api">
    Workflow coordinator for dispatch state transitions, escalation policies, and SLA checkpoints.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Edge Monitor" href="/emergency-dispatch/vzw-edge-monitor-api">
    Daemonset agent collecting network health metrics and device reachability for Postman Insights.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Fleet State Cache" href="/emergency-dispatch/vzw-fleet-state-cache-api">
    Low-latency cache for responder status snapshots, dispatch readiness, and unit heartbeat summaries.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Geospatial Hazard Intel" href="/emergency-dispatch/vzw-geospatial-hazard-intel-api">
    Geospatial hazard enrichment service for routing risk overlays and dynamic safety constraints.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Incident Intake Gateway" href="/emergency-dispatch/vzw-incident-intake-gateway-api">
    Incident ingress gateway for multi-channel intake normalization and request validation.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Location Routing" href="/emergency-dispatch/vzw-location-routing-api">
    Routing and geocoding services for dispatch and logistics flows.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Network Operations" href="/emergency-dispatch/vzw-network-operations-api">
    Verizon network operations APIs for OAuth, device location, and QoD session reservation.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Telemetry Ingest" href="/emergency-dispatch/vzw-telemetry-ingest-api">
    Real-time telemetry ingestion from dispatched ambulances for dashboarding and alerting.
  </Card>
</CardGroup>

## Private 5G Campus Operations

<CardGroup cols={3}>
  <Card title="Campus Device Registry" href="/private-5-g-campus/vzw-campus-device-registry-api">

    Campus edge identity broker for service-to-service trust and policy-bound token exchange.

    SLO monitoring, incident correlation, and service health scoring for campus operations.

    Zero-trust edge policy lifecycle and enforcement telemetry for regulated enterprise operations.

    Admission control service evaluating QoS policies, contention budgets, and slice placement eligibility.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Radio Observability Stream" href="/private-5-g-campus/vzw-radio-observability-stream-api">
    Streaming telemetry backbone for radio KPIs, interference events, and sector health indicators.
  </Card>
  <Card title="RAN Optimization" href="/private-5-g-campus/vzw-ran-optimization-api">
    Closed-loop radio optimization and rollout controls for private campus network performance.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Slice Orchestrator" href="/private-5-g-campus/vzw-slice-orchestrator-api">
    Network slice lifecycle orchestration with policy and QoS controls for enterprise 5G workloads.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Spectrum Allocation" href="/private-5-g-campus/vzw-spectrum-allocation-api">
    Spectrum grant planning and interference-aware channel allocation for private campus deployments.
  </Card>
</CardGroup>

## Utility Grid Intelligence

<CardGroup cols={3}>
  <Card title="Crew Mobilization" href="/utility-grid/vzw-crew-mobilization-api">
    Field crew dispatch and restoration workflow tracking for outage response coordination.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Demand Response" href="/utility-grid/vzw-demand-response-api">
    Demand-response event orchestration, participant signaling, and measured performance monitoring.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Grid Asset Registry" href="/utility-grid/vzw-grid-asset-registry-api">
    Authoritative utility grid asset registry for topology, lifecycle, and geospatial operations.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Grid Topology Sync" href="/utility-grid/vzw-grid-topology-sync-api">
    Grid topology synchronization layer reconciling upstream utility network models and topology revisions.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Load Forecasting" href="/utility-grid/vzw-load-forecasting-api">
    Forecasting pipeline for demand curves, feeder stress projections, and demand-response candidate windows.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Meter Connectivity" href="/utility-grid/vzw-meter-connectivity-api">
    Smart meter connectivity lifecycle, health telemetry, and profile controls across cellular networks.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Outage Correlation" href="/utility-grid/vzw-outage-correlation-api">
    Correlates meter, feeder, and network telemetry into outage hypotheses and impact assessments.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Regulatory Reporting" href="/utility-grid/vzw-regulatory-reporting-api">
    Auditable reliability and demand-response filing workflows for utility compliance reporting.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Restoration Priority Engine" href="/utility-grid/vzw-restoration-priority-engine-api">
    Restoration planning engine ranking outage events by customer impact, criticality, and crew availability.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Substation Edge Gateway" href="/utility-grid/vzw-substation-edge-gateway-api">
    Edge protocol gateway for substation telemetry ingestion, command relay, and secure channel mediation.
  </Card>
</CardGroup>
